description: GlucoGardener RAG 独立评测集。required_concepts 基于医学知识独立制定，不参考知识库文档内容。评测标准：检索到的上下文是否覆盖回答该问题所需的核心概念。

cases.query: I just started metformin and I keep feeling sick after eating. Is this normal?
required_concepts: metformin gastrointestinal side effects are common
cases.rationale: Common new patient concern; answer requires knowing metformin GI side effects are expected and manageable

cases.query: My doctor added gliclazide to my metformin. What should I watch out for?
cases.rationale: Tests whether retriever finds sulphonylurea combination risk, not just individual drug info

cases.query: 我的医生给我开了胰岛素，我很害怕打针，可以不用吗？
required_concepts: insulin is necessary when oral medications insufficient
cases.rationale: 中文查询，测试跨语言检索胰岛素相关内容

cases.query: Can I take my diabetes medication with grapefruit juice?
required_concepts: grapefruit interacts with certain medications via CYP3A4
cases.rationale: Specific drug interaction query; tests depth of medication content

cases.query: Boleh saya minum ubat diabetes pada waktu pagi atau malam?
required_concepts: medication timing depends on drug type
cases.rationale: 马来文药物时间查询，测试跨语言

cases.query: I missed my metformin dose this morning. Should I take double dose now?
required_concepts: skip missed dose if close to next dose time
cases.rationale: Missed dose is a very common patient question

cases.query: Is white rice bad for diabetes? I eat it every day.
required_concepts: white rice has high glycaemic index
alternatives such as brown rice or smaller portions
cases.rationale: Core Singapore food concern; white rice is dietary staple

cases.query: 我每天早上喝咖啡加炼奶，这样对血糖有影响吗？
required_concepts: condensed milk is high in sugar
sweetened drinks raise blood glucose rapidly
switch to kopi-O kosong or unsweetened options
cases.rationale: Singapore-specific: kopi with condensed milk is extremely common

cases.query: What is the healthiest hawker food option for a diabetic?
required_concepts: clear soup noodles better than fried
yong tau foo or thunder tea rice recommended
cases.rationale: Singapore-specific hawker food guidance

cases.query: Can I eat fruit? I heard fruit has a lot of sugar.
required_concepts: fruit contains natural sugars but also fibre
cases.rationale: Common patient misconception that all fruit is forbidden

cases.query: Semasa bulan puasa, apa yang patut saya makan waktu sahur?
required_concepts: suhoor should be low GI slow-release foods
avoid high sugar foods at suhoor
cases.rationale: 马来文斋月饮食查询

cases.query: எனக்கு இரவு சாப்பிட்ட பிறகு இரத்த சர்க்கரை எப்போதும் அதிகமாக இருக்கிறது. என்ன சாப்பிடலாம்?
required_concepts: low GI foods reduce post-meal spike
portion size and food combination matter
cases.rationale: 泰米尔文餐后高血糖饮食查询，触发改写链路

cases.query: My colleague says diabetics cannot eat any carbs. Is that true?
cases.rationale: Common misconception test

cases.query: What should my blood sugar be before and after meals?
cases.rationale: Fundamental target knowledge every patient needs

cases.query: I woke up with blood sugar 4.1 mmol/L, I feel a bit shaky. What do I do?
required_concepts: treat with fast-acting glucose if symptomatic
cases.rationale: Borderline hypoglycaemia with symptoms - requires specific action plan

cases.query: My HbA1c is 8.5%, my doctor says it's too high. What does this mean?
required_concepts: HbA1c reflects average glucose over 3 months
cases.rationale: HbA1c interpretation is frequently misunderstood

cases.query: 每次站起来就头晕，坐下来又好了，是血糖低吗？
required_concepts: symptoms on standing suggest postural hypotension not hypoglycaemia
postural hypotension is different from low blood sugar
cases.rationale: 关键鉴别诊断：体位性低血压 vs 低血糖，错误建议（吃东西）可能有害

cases.query: Can stress affect my blood sugar levels?
required_concepts: both physical and emotional stress affect glucose
stress management is part of diabetes care
cases.rationale: Tests psychosocial aspect of diabetes management

cases.query: Is it safe to exercise when my blood sugar is 14 mmol/L?
required_concepts: exercise with high blood glucose has risks
threshold above which exercise not recommended
cases.rationale: Hyperglycaemia + exercise safety threshold

cases.query: What kind of exercise is best for lowering blood sugar?
required_concepts: 150 minutes moderate intensity per week recommended
cases.rationale: Standard exercise prescription for diabetes

cases.query: 我做完运动血糖反而升高了，是正常的吗？
required_concepts: short-term glucose rise possible after intense exercise
stress hormone response to high intensity
moderate intensity exercise more consistent benefit
cases.rationale: 常见困惑：运动后血糖反升，测试知识库深度

cases.query: My feet get numb when I walk. Should I still exercise?
required_concepts: foot inspection before and after exercise
consult doctor before starting exercise programme
cases.rationale: Complication (neuropathy) affecting exercise decisions

cases.query: I have a small cut on my foot that's not healing. What should I do?
required_concepts: diabetic foot wounds require prompt attention
see doctor if not healing within days
do not ignore foot wounds in diabetes
cases.rationale: Diabetic foot emergency - delayed treatment is dangerous

cases.query: My vision has been blurry lately. Is it related to my diabetes?
required_concepts: blurry vision can be diabetic retinopathy
high blood glucose affects lens and retina
cases.rationale: Retinopathy is a common complication patients miss

cases.query: How do I check my feet properly?
required_concepts: check for cuts blisters redness swelling
cases.rationale: Routine foot care procedure

cases.query: What is the best mobile phone to buy in Singapore?
cases.rationale: 完全无关查询，应返回空

cases.query: How do I apply for HDB flat?
cases.rationale: 新加坡相关但非医疗查询

cases.query: Can you help me write a cover letter?
cases.rationale: 非医疗请求

cases.query: What are the symptoms of COVID-19?
cases.rationale: 医疗查询但不在知识库范围内（非糖尿病相关）

history.content: I feel dizzy and shaky right now.
Can you check your blood sugar now? And are you feeling this way after standing up, or has it been ongoing?

cases.query: I just checked, it's 3.2 mmol/L.
cases.rationale: 多轮对话：确认低血糖后的处理，需要结合上文

history.content: I ate nasi lemak for breakfast today.
How much did you have? The coconut rice in nasi lemak can raise blood sugar quite a bit.

cases.query: A full plate with fried chicken and all the sides. My sugar is now 13.
required_concepts: nasi lemak is high GI high fat
light walking can help reduce post-meal glucose
cases.rationale: 多轮对话：食物 + 餐后高血糖处理

history.content: 我上个月开始打胰岛素了。
开始打胰岛素是很大的一步，你适应得怎么样？

cases.query: 有时候打完之后血糖会掉得很低，怎么办？
required_concepts: timing of insulin relative to meals
report to doctor to adjust dose
cases.rationale: 中文多轮：胰岛素低血糖处理

history.content: Doctor says I need to exercise more but my knees hurt.
Knee pain can make exercise tricky. Is the pain there all the time or only with certain movements?

cases.query: Only when I walk for more than 10 minutes or go up stairs.
required_concepts: low-impact exercise alternatives for knee problems
swimming or cycling reduces knee load
cases.rationale: 多轮对话：运动障碍（膝痛）的替代方案

history.content: Ramadan is starting next week. I'm a bit worried.
That's understandable. Have you spoken to your doctor yet about adjusting your medications for fasting?

cases.query: Not yet. What should I tell my doctor?
required_concepts: discuss glucose monitoring frequency during fast
know when to break the fast thresholds
cases.rationale: 多轮对话：斋月前医疗准备

history.content: My wound on my toe has been there for 3 weeks already.
3 weeks is a long time for a wound not to heal. Is it getting bigger, deeper, or does it smell?

cases.query: It's the same size but a bit red around it now.
required_concepts: redness around wound indicates possible infection
diabetic foot infection requires urgent medical attention
do not wait longer — see doctor today
risk of serious complication if untreated
cases.rationale: 多轮对话：糖尿病足感染迹象，需要紧急建议

history.content: சாப்பிட்ட பிறகு எனது இரத்த சர்க்கரை 11 ஆக இருக்கிறது.
11 mmol/L is a bit high after meals. What did you eat?

cases.query: நான் வெள்ளை சோறும் மீன் கறியும் சாப்பிட்டேன்.
required_concepts: reduce rice portion to lower post-meal glucose
cases.rationale: 泰米尔多轮对话：餐后高血糖 + 饮食建议

history.content: I've been feeling really tired lately.
Fatigue can have several causes with diabetes. Have you checked your blood sugar recently?

cases.query: Yes, it's been around 9-10 most of the time.
required_concepts: rule out other causes with doctor
cases.rationale: 多轮对话：慢性高血糖导致的疲劳
